title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 144.270 - Rulemaking authority
text:
144.270.  Rulemaking authority. — For the purpose of more efficiently securing the payment of and accounting for the tax imposed by this chapter, the director of revenue shall make, promulgate and enforce reasonable rules and regulations for the administration and enforcement of the provisions of this chapter.
(RSMo 1939 § 11413, A.L. 1941 p. 698, A.L. 1943 p. 1012, A.L. 1945 p. 1865, A.L. 1947 V. I p. 553, A.L. 1955 p. 829, A.L. 1961 p. 633, A.L. 2008 H.B. 1828 merged with S.B. 979)
